name: Mount Fuji
eruptionHistory: Last erupted in 1707 during the Hoei eruption, which deposited ash on Edo (Tokyo). Has erupted at least 16 times since 781 CE.
description: Japan's highest peak and most iconic volcano. Mount Fuji is a near-perfect stratovolcano that has been dormant since 1707. It is a UNESCO World Heritage Site and a sacred symbol of Japan.
